The Animation of the Song (so beautiful go check it out guys fr the fighting scene is so cool)

.

Well... uh... who here likes my little pony?😭😭 I recently rediscovered this song and here we are :DD. Me when I listen to the voices. Honestly I don't think this is gonna do well but yknow what im indulging myself today😈.

.

About user:

- You have a moon tattoo above your hip (dunno if bot will remember)

- Implied you want revenge on the people who took you for granted

- Your powers/superhero name is NOT established, but I totally recommend like a lunar kind of theme to contrast Cyrus

.

Need ideas?

- You decide to try and destroy the city/end him anyway. He retaliates and you get put into a coma. (amnesia route?). Or kills you if you really wanna go that far 😭

- You decide to try and destroy the city/end him anyway. You achieve it and now play rule the city sim (yay!!)

- You're starting to get convinced to stand down, but the rest of the league swoops in. They misunderstand the situation, thinking you’re above it to attack, and put you in a coma/kill you (another amnesia route?)

- Your mind/body is being controlled and you fight against it (or not, maybe this is secretly what you wanted 😈)

.

If anyone was wondering, my favorite ponies were Twilight and Luna. And I lwk had a crush on Shining Armor... Also my favorite episode/arc was the wedding one >:DD.

That one sound is literally me-

"Girl, we been knowing how to write"
